fields.name: heroVideo
fields.label: Hero video — desktop
fields.description: Upload an MP4 video. Recommended: 1920 × 1280px (landscape). Use a compressed H.264 MP4 for best browser support.

fields.name: heroVideoMobile
fields.label: Hero video — mobile
fields.description: Optional. Upload a portrait MP4 for mobile. Recommended: 1080 × 1350px (4:5). Falls back to desktop video if not set.

fields.name: heroImage
fields.label: Hero image (fallback)
fields.description: Recommended: 2200 × 1240px (landscape, 16:9 or wider). Cropped to centre. Used when no video is set.

fields.name: projectDescription
fields.label: Project page description (sticky, used as default)

fields.name: favicon
fields.label: Favicon
fields.description: Recommended: 512 × 512px PNG or SVG. Shown as the browser tab icon.

fields.name: cardImageOverlay
fields.label: Card image overlay (optional, stacks on top)
fields.description: Same size as card image: 1200 × 1200px square.

fields.name: src
fields.label: Image
fields.description: Recommended: 2000 × 1130px (landscape, ~16:9). Cropped to centre. On mobile crops to ~16:10.

fields.name: src
fields.label: Video (MP4)
fields.description: Upload a compressed H.264 MP4. Recommended: 2000 × 1130px (landscape, ~16:9). Autoplays muted and loops.

fields.name: leftSrc
fields.label: Left image
fields.description: Recommended: 1200 × 1340px (portrait, ~9:10). On mobile stacks full-width and crops to ~1:1.

fields.name: leftVideoSrc
fields.label: Left video (MP4, overrides image)
fields.description: Optional. Upload an MP4 to use video instead of an image on the left. Autoplays muted and loops.

fields.name: rightSrc
fields.label: Right image
fields.description: Recommended: 1200 × 1340px (portrait, ~9:10). On mobile stacks full-width and crops to ~1:1.

fields.name: rightVideoSrc
fields.label: Right video (MP4, overrides image)
fields.description: Optional. Upload an MP4 to use video instead of an image on the right. Autoplays muted and loops.
